about.heading: Three Decades of Trust, Quality & Steel Excellence.
about.description: At Namo Steel, we bring over three decades of experience in the steel industry, built on trust, quality, and long-term customer relationships. Led by Pratik Khivsara — a postgraduate in Finance with a modern vision for industrial growth — we serve evolving market needs through quality products, professional service, and lasting business partnerships. Our commitment to integrity, timely delivery, and continuous improvement has helped us build a trusted name in the steel sector.
about.vision: To serve evolving market needs through quality products, professional service, and long-term business partnerships built on integrity and industrial excellence.
about.mission: To grow with our customers by providing dependable solutions, competitive value, and a strong foundation of trust that has been carried forward for generations.

why.heading: Reasons to Partner with Namo Steel

items.title: Wide Product Range Under One Roof
Strict Quality Control for Strength, Shape, Gauge & Bonding
Fast & On-Time Delivery
items.desc: We understand project timelines. Our logistics ensure your material arrives exactly when you need it.

items.title: High Accuracy in Order Fulfillment
items.desc: Precise quantities, correct grades, and verified dimensions on every single order.

items.title: Technical Support & Customized Solutions
items.desc: Our experts help you choose the right product and can supply made-to-order specifications.

caseStudies.title: Industrial Packers
caseStudies.desc: We designed and supplied custom-made skids from chequered plates to securely transport engines. The skids were precisely engineered for a perfect fit, ensuring safe transport and reusability for up to 5 years. With a 7-year track record of supplying quality raw materials like channels & plates, we delivered a durable, returnable solution that met all requirements for accuracy, strength, and ease of handling.

caseStudies.title: Omkar Industries
caseStudies.desc: Omkar Industries required made-to-order CRC sheets in precise dimensions: 435 × 1250 × 1.5 mm and 353 × 1250 × 1.5 mm. They needed sheets with exact measurements, high-quality finish, scratch-free surfaces, no rust, and secure packaging. We delivered perfectly matched material meeting all quality standards.

caseStudies.title: Patil Automation Limited
caseStudies.desc: Referred by BNI member Shashi Ji, we began supplying plates, angles, channels, CRC sheets and more to Patil Automation Limited six years ago. Our quality and timely service have made this a lasting partnership that continues today.

caseStudies.title: Convill Landmark
caseStudies.desc: Through a strong referral from BNI members Kareem Chambe and Omkar, we connected with Convill Landmark. This recommendation led to a ₹10 crore project, where we supplied PMC bars for the entire development.

caseStudies.title: Doodh Techno Projects
caseStudies.desc: Referred by member Shubham, we have been supplying TMT bars and structural steel to Doodh Techno Projects for the past three years, ensuring consistent quality and timely delivery.

caseStudies.title: Praveen Rawat & Associates
caseStudies.project: TMT Bars for Modern College Contractors
caseStudies.desc: Referred by member Sandeep Shah, we began supplying TMT bars to Praveen Rawat and Associates, contractors for Modern College, for the past three years.

contact.heading: Let's Build Something Strong Together
contact.subheading: Reach out to us for inquiries, quotes, or customized steel solutions. We're ready to serve your project needs.

footer.tagline: Trusted dealers in construction and industrial steel products since 1995. Serving the industry with quality, reliability, and competitive pricing.
